generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for the 1/10-scale teleoperated vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle state information (speed, position) for the 1/10-scale teleoperated vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance PointCloudClusteringComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for point cloud clustering and tracking in Physical Twin Entity"
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for data translation and unit conversions in Physical Twin Entity"
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks data after clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance TranslatedVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data after unit conversions and message alignment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ACCInputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input data for ACC computations including object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for monitoring real-time vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and object tracks via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataMonitoringInsight
]

instance DataMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle state, projected paths, and object tracks for operators"
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation commands) from vehicle ECU to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationAction
]

instance ACCComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC computations to Digital Twin for efficient processing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling remote operation of ACC (enable/disable, set speed, emergency braking) and developer data collection for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction, TroubleshootingInsight
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC system (enable/disable, set speed, emergency braking) by operators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data collection for developer troubleshooting during development phase"
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Data Monitoring service providing UI for viewing and reporting vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Computation Offloading service handling ACC system computations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Remote Management service providing remote control and troubleshooting capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance VehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated vehicle with lower and upper chassis layers for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) systems"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserInterfaceEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity handling Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking and device communication"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity handling computation offloading and data processing"
]

instance UserInterfaceEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface Entity split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel subcomponents"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface for real-time vehicle visualization"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface for operator commands"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for adaptive cruise control (ACC), motor actuation, and steering operations are processed by the Controlling FE and Data Translation component, which serializes data and aligns message types. Communication occurs via ROS2 for internal software components and Wi-Fi UDP for inter-entity communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between devices, as mandated by safety-critical vehicular standards, with hardware limitations necessitating this threshold. This ensures temporal consistency across physical and digital components for real-time operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) is deployed on separate hardware, and the Physical Twin Entity's role extends beyond the standard's OME to include resource-specific functions like sensor data processing. Coordination between entities is managed through ROS2 node communication within the vehicle's distributed system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication is conducted over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer protocol. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliant with ISO 23247 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) implement specific tasks, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) cited as a protocol for data collection and device control interoperability."
]
